Properties.Name: Legal Advice
Properties.Remarks: Users should raise this request if they seek legal advice from internal legal team. Please ensure you provide details as per the Intake form and fulfil the checklist before submitting the request. Refer to help document for instruction on filing the forms

Properties.Name: Legal Document
Properties.Remarks: Raised this request if you need to get any legal document reviewed and approved by the Legal team. Please make sure you fill in the intake form properly and fulfil all the check-list items. Upload the draft copy of document in the Draft folder while submitting the request.
